channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: NBA's Lakers, Clippers home games to resume on Monday after weekend games postponed amid wildfires
item.description: The NBA said home games for both the Los Angeles Lakers and Los Angeles Clippers would resume on Monday, after both teams had games postponed due to the wildfires.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jannik Sinner starts his Australian Open title defense with a straight set win
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — After wasting a set point in the second tiebreaker with an ill-conceived drop shot, Jannik Sinner quickly reverted to what's been working for him and finished off a straight-set win over Nicolas Jarry to begin his Australian Open title defense.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jayden Daniels leads Commanders to first playoff win in nearly 7,000 days, 23-20 over the Buccaneers
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — New owners. New general manager. New coach. New franchise quarterback. That’s the formula — with an emphasis on the QB — that Washington rode to playoff success after nearly two decades of futility.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Lamar Jackson and Josh Allen will face off for a berth in the AFC championship game
item.description: Lamar Jackson vs. Josh Allen won’t decide the NFL MVP next week. The stakes are higher with a spot in the AFC championship game on the line.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nick Taylor wins another playoff with clutch play on the 18th in the Sony Open
item.description: HONOLULU (AP) — Nick Taylor in a playoff is tough to beat. Getting there was hardest part for the Canadian, who delivered another highlight reel of clutch moments Sunday in the Sony Open.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Pacers end NBA-leading Cavaliers' winning streak at 12 with 108-93 victory
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Andrew Nembhard scored 19 points, Pascal Siakam had 18 points and nine rebounds and the Indiana Pacers ended NBA-leading Cleveland's winning streak at 12 games, beating the Cavaliers 108-93 on Sunday night. The teams will complete the home-and-home set Tuesday night in Indianapolis.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN DULIK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hurts tosses 2 TD passes and Goedert throws 3 stiff-arms to lead Eagles past Packers 22-10
item.description: Jalen Hurts threw two touchdown passes in his first game since a late-season concussion, Dallas Goedert threw three stiff-arms on a rugged touchdown catch and the Philadelphia Eagles rode their NFL-best defense to a 22-10 wild-card playoff win over the Green Bay Packers.
item.dc:creator: Dan Gelston, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Josh Allen leads balanced offense as Bills dominate Broncos for 31-7 wild-card win
item.description: Josh Allen threw two touchdown passes, James Cook scored on a 5-yard run and finished with 120 yards rushing, and the Buffalo Bills leaned on a balanced offensive attack in a 31-7 win over the Denver Broncos in a wild-card playoff game.
item.dc:creator: John Wawrow, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Philadelphia 76ers reportedly reverse course, won't build contentious $1.3B downtown stadium
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — The Philadelphia 76ers have decided not to build a $1.3 billion downtown arena, a surprising move that comes just weeks after the team received approval for the controversial project from the city council.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ohio State favored by 9½ points over Notre Dame in CFP title game
item.description: The Buckeyes are the second-biggest favorites in the title game since the playoff began 10 years ago.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Fired US Center for SafeSport investigator arrested on new charges
item.description: An investigator fired from his job at the U.S. Center for SafeSport for allegedly stealing money seized at a drug bust has been arrested again.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Steelers' George Pickens makes stunning remark after playoff loss vs Ravens
item.description: Pittsburgh Steelers wide receiver George Pickens made it clear he has no optimism in the team's offense for the future after a playoff loss to the Baltimore Ravens.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Inman: 10 reasons the 49ers could reach the Super Bowl at Levi’s Stadium in 2026
item.description: The 49ers went from first in the NFC to last in their division this season. They have the talent to reach those heights again after resting up this offseason.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Justin Verlander and San Francisco Giants finalize $15 million, 1-year contract
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Justin Verlander and the San Francisco Giants finalized a $15 million, one-year contract on Saturday. A three-time AL Cy Young Award winner, Verlander joins a projected rotation led by All-Star right-hander Logan Webb.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Horse racing, college basketball games postponed due to devastating wildfires across Los Angeles region
item.description: A flareup of one of the four active wildfires in the Los Angeles area brought a new round of evacuations, and Santa Anita canceled this weekend's horse racing.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NBA postpones Rockets vs. Hawks game because of winter storm
item.description: The game between the Houston Rockets and Atlanta Hawks scheduled for Saturday has been postponed because of a winter storm.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NFL moves Vikings-Rams playoff game to Arizona after days of devastating wildfires in Los Angeles
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The NFL has moved the Rams' wild-card playoff game against the Minnesota Vikings to Arizona after days of devastating wildfires in the Los Angeles area. The game will be played Monday night at State Farm Stadium, the home of the Arizona Cardinals, in suburban Glendale.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Notre Dame secures spot in the CFP National Championship after win over Penn State
item.description: Notre Dame has secured a spot in the College Football Playoff National Championship game after defeating Penn State 27-24 in the Orange Bowl on Thursday night. This is a breaking news update, the original story can be found below. No. 3 Notre Dame (13-1, CFP No. 7 seed) vs. No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Bears denied permission by Cowboys to interview Mike McCarthy for head coaching job
item.description: CHICAGO — The Bears are casting a wide net in their search for the 18th head coach in franchise history as a critical offseason for the team gets underway. One potential candidate will have to be taken off the interview list — at least for the next several days, if not for good.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Allstate CEO criticized for comments following New Orleans attack
item.description: NewsNation media contributor Colby Hall believes Wilson's intentions behind his message were good but says it was ultimately "tone deaf.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Lawsuit alleges ex-Fox Sports host Skip Bayless harassed hairstylist, offered her $1.5 million for sex
item.description: The complaint claims Fox executives fostered a hostile work environment that allowed senior managers and on-air personalities including Bayless to abuse workers without fear of punishment.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5
